sections.paragraph: (“fugitive”), [Haggeri, Hagarite], 1Ch 11:38 27:31 . Pl. הַגְרִים Psa 83:7, and הַגְרִיאִים 1Ch 5:10, 19 1Ch 5:19, 20 1Ch 5:20 [Hagarites, Hagarenes], pr.n. of an Arabian people, with which the tribes who lived beyond Jordan waged war. Doubtless this corresponds to the Arab. هَجَرُ, whence the Gent. n. ها جر ى a people and district near the Persian gulf, Ἀγραῖοι ap. Strab.xvi. p. 767 Casaub., Ἀγρέες Dionys. Perieg. 956, in the province now called Bahhrein.
